nodes.name: Inbox Watcher
nodes.description: Scans local directory for incoming simulated email payloads (PDF + metadata json).

nodes.name: PDF Text Extraction
nodes.description: Uses pdfplumber to extract raw text layers from PDF attachments, maintaining basic page structures.

nodes.name: Groq Invoice Extraction
nodes.description: Passes raw text to Groq LLM (Llama 3) to extract structured JSON data according to a strict Pydantic schema.

nodes.name: PO Retrieval
nodes.description: Looks up the extracted Purchase Order number in the SQLite database to fetch expected PO details.

nodes.name: Field Comparison
nodes.description: Compares extracted invoice fields (vendor, amounts, line items) against PO records, applying fuzzy matching and percentage-based tolerances.

nodes.name: Discrepancy Detection
nodes.description: Analyzes match results to flag business discrepancies (e.g. price mismatch, missing items, vendor mismatch) as major or minor severity.

nodes.name: Validation Rules
nodes.description: Determines overall invoice status ('Ready for Payment', 'Procurement Review', 'Rejected') based on discrepancy severities.

nodes.name: Store Invoice Record
nodes.description: Persists the full invoice record, matching summary, discrepancies, and generates an audit log trail.

nodes.name: Procurement Review
nodes.description: REST API endpoints serving a frontend UI for human reviewers to view extracted data alongside the PO and discrepancy analysis.

nodes.name: Approval/Rejection
nodes.description: Final human override or approval workflow endpoints that update invoice status and append audit logs.
